trpc_calls.inputExpr:
{
        workspaceId,
        sequenceId,
        startDate: dateRange.from.toISOString(),
        endDate: dateRange.to.toISOString(),

firestore_refs.raw:
query(
      refs.organizations(),
      where(documentId(), "in", ids),
      orderBy(documentId())
    ), handler

query(
      refs.warmupSessions(workspaceId),
      where("accountId", "==", accountId),
      where("executionDate", ">=", subDays(new Date(), 7)),
      orderBy("executionDate", "asc")
    ), handler
refs.warmupSessions(workspaceId), where("accountId", "==", accountId), where("executionDate", ">=", subDays(new Date(), 7)), orderBy("executionDate", "asc")

query(
      refs.warmupSessions(workspaceId),
      where("accountId", "==", accountId),
      where("status", "==", "pending"),
      where("executionDate", ">=", Timestamp.now()),
      orderBy("executionDate", "asc"),
      limit(1)
    )
refs.warmupSessions(workspaceId), where("accountId", "==", accountId), where("status", "==", "pending"), where("executionDate", ">=", Timestamp.now()), orderBy("executionDate", "asc"), limit(1)

query(
      refs.dialogs(workspaceId),
      or(
        where("peerId", "==", contact.telegram?.id ?? "_nope_"),
        where(
          "usernamesNormalized",
          "array-contains",
          contact.telegram?.usernameNormalized ?? "_nope_"
        )
      )
    )

refs.dialogs(workspaceId), or(
        where("peerId", "==", contact.telegram?.id ?? "_nope_"),
        where(
          "usernamesNormalized",
          "array-contains",
          contact.telegram?.usernameNormalized ?? "_nope_"
        )
      )

query(
      refs.workspaces(),
      where("members" satisfies keyof Workspace, "array-contains", userId),
      orderBy("name" satisfies keyof Workspace, "asc")
    ), handler
refs.workspaces(), where("members" satisfies keyof Workspace, "array-contains", userId), orderBy("name" satisfies keyof Workspace, "asc")
